parsed.production_notes: The top panel features an AI-generated robot with unnatural, perfectly smooth movements and a static background. The bottom panel shows a human actor, though the video might be slightly manipulated or dubbed.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot with a white/silver metallic body, blue eyes, and a smooth, featureless face.
Young Indian woman, medium build, brown complexion, dark wavy hair.
characters.demeanor: Attentive, learning, slightly hesitant but eager.

scenes.setting: Split screen: Top is a warm-toned Indian interior/street, Bottom is an indoor room with plants.

panels.panel_visual_description: A humanoid robot with a smooth, white metallic casing and blue eyes is positioned in the center of the frame, facing forward. The background is a slightly blurred, warm-toned Indian interior or street scene with traditional elements like a framed picture and brass items. The lighting is soft and even. Character A is speaking.

A young Indian woman with dark, wavy hair and a brown complexion is seated indoors, facing the camera. She is wearing a beige and brown patterned top. The background includes a window with natural light and several potted green plants. The lighting is natural and highlights her face. Character B is speaking and listening.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with a robot on top and a woman on the bottom. They are having a conversation. Text overlays appear in the center, translating or highlighting their speech. A red 'X' and a green checkmark graphic appear briefly to indicate incorrect and correct grammar.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: నువ్వు ఎప్పుడు వస్తావు? [When will you come?]
Character B says: I will return back on Monday.
Character A says: Return back అనకూడదు... [You shouldn't say return back...]
Character A says: Return అంటేనే తిరిగి రావడం అని అర్థం. [Return itself means coming back.]
Character A says: Return మరియు back రెండూ కలిపి చెబితే - "ఎందుకు మళ్ళీ మళ్ళీ వస్తున్నారు?" అని అర్థం వస్తుంది. [If you say return and back together, it means "why are you coming again and again?"]
Character A says: Just say - I will return on Monday. [Just say - I will return on Monday.]
Character B says: ఓహో... సరే సరే. [Oh... okay okay.]
scenes.on_screen_text: నువ్వు ఎప్పుడు (When will you), I will return, Return back అనకూడదు... (Shouldn't say return back...), Return అంటేనే (Return means), తిరిగి రావడం (coming back), Return మరియు (Return and), back రెండూ కలిపి (back both together), చెబితే - "ఎందుకు (if said - "why), మళ్ళీ మళ్ళీ వస్తున్నారు?" (are you coming again and again?"), అని అర్థం వస్తుంది (it means), Just say - I will, return on Monday, ఓహో... సరే సరే (Oh... okay okay)

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen layout continues. The woman expresses a concern, and the robot responds. Text overlays continue to appear in the center, matching the spoken dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: నాకు English సరిగ్గా రాదు. [I don't know English properly.]
Character A says: No problem. AI teachers try చేశారా? [No problem. Have you tried AI teachers?]
Character B says: అది expensive-గా ఉంటుంది కదా? [That would be expensive, right?]
Character A says: అసలు ఛాన్సే లేదు. [No chance at all.]
Character A says: Normal English classes కంటే ఇది 7 రెట్లు cheap. [This is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes.]
scenes.on_screen_text: నాకు English (To me English), సరిగ్గా రాదు (doesn't come properly), No problem, AI teachers try, చేశారా (did you), అది expensive-గా (That expensive), ఉంటుంది కదా (will be right), అసలు ఛాన్సే లేదు (No chance at all), Normal English, classes కంటే (than classes), ఇది 7 రెట్లు cheap (this is 7 times cheap)

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen conversation continues. Large 3D-style graphics pop up in the center of the screen, temporarily obscuring the characters. First, a gold "50 LAKHS" graphic appears, followed by a silver clock graphic. Text overlays continue to appear.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: అందుకే 50 లక్షల మంది MySivi-లో English practice చేస్తున్నారు. [That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.]
Character B says: కానీ time దొరకడం లేదు. [But I don't get time.]
Character A says: Daily కేవలం 15-20 minutes practice చేస్తే చాలు. [Practicing for just 15-20 minutes daily is enough.]
Character A says: మీరు చాలా confident అవుతారు. [You will become very confident.]
scenes.on_screen_text: అందుకే 50 లక్షల (That's why 50 lakhs), మంది MySivi-లో (people in MySivi), English practice, చేస్తున్నారు (are doing), కానీ time (But time), దొరకడం లేదు (not getting), Daily కేవలం 15-20 (Daily just 15-20), minutes practice, చేస్తే చాలు (if done is enough), మీరు చాలా confident (You very confident), అవుతారు (will become)

scenes.visual_description: The final part of the split-screen conversation. The robot gives instructions on how to join. A large 3D-style calendar graphic with "15 DAYS" pops up in the center. Text overlays continue to appear, ending with a call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: వావ్. నేను ఎలా join అవ్వాలి? [Wow. How should I join?]
Character A says: ఈ install button నొక్కి MySivi app install చేసుకోండి. [Click this install button and install the MySivi app.]
Character A says: Sign up చేసి practice-ని start చేయండి. [Sign up and start practicing.]
Character A says: కేవలం 15 days-లో మీకు improvement కనిపిస్తుంది. [You will see improvement in just 15 days.]
Character A says: Let's start. [Let's start.]
scenes.on_screen_text: వావ్ (Wow), నేను ఎలా (I how), join అవ్వాలి (should join), ఈ install button (This install button), నొక్కి MySivi (pressing MySivi), app install చేసుకోండి (install app), Sign up చేసి practice-ని (Sign up and practice), start చేయండి (start), కేవలం 15 days-లో (In just 15 days), మీకు improvement (to you improvement), కనిపిస్తుంది (will appear), Let's start
